message:
fix(ssh): implement proper EOF handling on stdin closure and defer output stream close

Send SSH EOF signal when stdin pipe closes (UnexpectedEof) instead of
immediately closing the channel, allowing the remote process to flush
remaining output. Add maybe_close_exited_output() helper that defers
output stream closure until process has exited AND buffer is empty,
preventing premature truncation of stderr.

- Add ChannelWrap::send_eof() for both ssh2 and libssh backends
- Refactor SessionInner stdin error handling to distinguish EOF from errors
- Unit tests for maybe_close_exited_output edge cases (empty, buffered, running)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
